Amenify offers a seamless platform specifically designed to help real estate developers, operators, and property managers optimize the performance of their properties. By providing tailored, on-demand services such as housekeeping, grocery delivery, and premium memberships, Amenify enhances tenant satisfaction, improves operational efficiency, and creates new revenue streams. This approach helps your properties excel in the competitive market.

Our Pros are trained for 5-star service and our Concierge team is available 7 days a week. We also centralize and analyze data for constant improvement.

title: Resident-protection-plan
content:
Resident Protection Plan — Amenify
Reimbursements up to $1,500 Annually
The Amenify Resident Protection Plan is an affordable, optional subscription that reimburses common everyday accidental damages to your rental home and certain management fees as well.
This is not renter insurance which is rarely used - if ever, and only for extreme incents such as theft or fire. The Amenify Protection Plan is practical and for common incidents that you are likely to experience.
What’s Covered Under the Protection Plan?
Accidental Damage Reimbursement
: Up to $1,000 annually, with a maximum of $250 per quarter for damages like carpet stains, damaged blinds, drywall holes, countertop nicks everything that comes with normal living.
Key or Fob Replacement (including your mailbox key)
: Up to $50 per instance—because things happen.
: Up to $50 per instance—no one wants to be locked out, and no one should have to pay through the nose for it.
Missed Maintenance Appointment Fees
: Up to $50 per instance—because appointments get missed, and residents shouldn’t be penalized for it.
: Up to $200 for hotel stays if displacement occurs—sometimes life throws curveballs.
— even for damages from the move itself.
A qualifying damage or fee occurs.
You pay your Management Company for the repair or fee.
Submit proof of payment in your
That’s it. Simple, fast, and hassle-free.
*All benefits are subject to change at any time. Specific terms and conditions apply to each benefit.
How is this different from Renters' Insurance?
While renters' insurance is great for catastrophic events like fire or theft, it’s rare. What about the everyday issues that come with renting? That’s where the Amenify Resident Protection Plan steps in.
: Covers the big, catastrophic stuff—fire, theft, water damage.
: Covers the small, everyday stuff that renters deal with—accidental damages, lockouts, missed maintenance fees.
protection when you need it most
—the type of stuff that slips through the cracks of renters' insurance.
Accidental Damage Reimbursement
Receive up to $1,000 in reimbursements for certain accidental damages.
Missed Appointment Reimbursement
If Residents get charged a trip fee for a Landlord-missed-maintenance appointment, they can get reimbursed for 50% of this.
Lockouts happen to everyone. Residents get a one-time use benefit up to $50 in reimbursement for a lockout.
Get reimbursed for a night at a hotel if a resident contacts the maintenance line about a habitable emergency.
If Resident move-in maintenance isn’t completed by Landlord within two weeks after move-in, we’ll send a $50 gift card.
Residents can request drain unclogging snakes in the mail to help reduce the need for plumbers and handyman services.

title: Cleaning-services
content:
Professional Cleaning Services Near Me | Amenify — Amenify
Most people struggle to find time to clean their apartments, let alone reliable professional cleaning services. That’s where Amenify steps in. Our professional cleaning services are designed to give apartment residents the ultimate gift;
. By hiring private staff exclusively for apartment communities, we handle cleaning, chores, and more. To date, we’ve saved residents hundreds of thousands of hours, making their lives easier and their homes spotless.
“ The home cleaners do a great job every time. I really like having the cleaning program on auto-pilot as they come twice a month and they just make my place sparkle”
Get $50 cleaning bonus + $20 Monthly Credit - Sign Up Today
standard professional home cleaning service
is most popular for subscriptions and focuses on the kitchen, bathroom(s), and high traffic areas.
• Wipe exterior of stove, oven, microwave, and refrigerator
• Wash, scrub, and sanitize the toilet, shower, tub, and sink
• Clean countertops and mirrors
• Make the bed and change linens (if on bed)
• Vacuum, sweep, and mop floors and stairs
• Dust accessible surfaces, including window sills
is purchased most frequently for busy households with lots of activity at home and apartments that need a detailed and thorough clean, such as an annual “spring cleaning”.
• Deep scrub countertops and sink
• Load dishwasher (if dishes left in sink)
• Wipe exterior of appliances and cabinets
• Wipe under stove grates and range hood (if applicable)
• Deep wash, scrub, and sanitize the toilet, shower, tub, sink, and grout
• Clean countertops and mirrors
• Make the bed and change linens (if on bed)
• Vacuum, sweep, and mop floors and stairs
• Dust accessible surfaces, including windowsills and blinds
• Wipe baseboards, doors, and door frames
• Clean interior of reachable windows
Wipe down thoroughly, focusing on corners and edges.
Clean inside and out, including removable parts.
Empty, clean inside and outside, reorganize.
Scrub basin, faucet, and handles.
Clean bowl, exterior, and handle.
Scrub walls, floor, and door/curtain, focus on grout.
Vacuum and mop, deep clean carpets.
Vacuum upholstery, dust and polish wood.
Dust all surfaces, including electronics and light fixtures.
Clean shelves and walls, reorganize.
Dust and clean all furniture and lamps.
Clean floors, mats, doors, handles, organize clutter.
Dust baseboards, fixtures, vacuum/mop floors.
This concise guide ensures thorough deep cleaning for a spotless home.
Ensures that a home is thoroughly cleaned before moving in or after
. It’s a comprehensive service that covers all aspects of cleaning.
- Deep clean countertops, cabinets, backsplash, and sink.
- Clean the interior and exterior of cabinets.
- Wipe down the exterior of appliances (stove, oven, fridge, microwave).
- Clean the interior of appliances (stove, fridge, microwave).
- Deep wash and scrub grout; sanitize toilet, shower, tub, and sink.
- Clean countertops and mirrors.
- Clean the interior and exterior of cabinets.
- Vacuum, sweep, and mop floors and stairs.
- Wipe down all surfaces, including window sills and blinds.
- Clean the interior of reachable windows.
How Amenify’s Professional Cleaning Services Work
Choose Your Level of Service: Standard or Deep Clean
Amenify offers several levels of cleaning services, from hotel-style, surface-focused cleaning to comprehensive deep cleaning. We support residents through the various stages of apartment living, ensuring a clean and comfortable environment.
Decide When to Start Service and How Frequently
Our subscription options include monthly, twice monthly, and weekly cleaning services. Additionally, you can opt for one-time cleanings. Whether you need regular maintenance or a deep clean before a special occasion, Amenify has got you covered.
Before our cleaners arrive, clear away as many personal belongings from countertops and floors as possible, put trash and recycling in containers, and securely store pets. This preparation ensures our team can clean efficiently and thoroughly.
Leave the details to us. Our professional cleaners will take care of everything, with our support team available seven days a week to assist with any needs or questions.
We have earned more than 100,000+ five-star reviews from satisfied residents.
We invite you to join them and reclaim your schedule. Let our Trusted Pros manage your housekeeping needs so you can focus on the more important aspects of your life.
What types of cleaning services does Amenify Offer?
Amenify offers a range of cleaning services, including standard cleaning and deep cleaning. Our services cater to various needs, from regular maintenance to comprehensive deep cleaning.
How do I find cleaning services near me with Amenify?
Finding cleaning services near you is easy with Amenify. We hire private staff for apartment communities, ensuring that our professional cleaners are conveniently located and ready to assist.
What are the cleaning service prices at Amenify?
Amenify offers competitive cleaning services prices to ensure affordability for all residents. Our pricing varies based on the type of service and frequency, but we always aim to provide affordable cleaning services without compromising on quality.
Can I schedule a one time cleaning service with Amenify?
Yes, you can schedule a one-time cleaning service with Amenify. Whether you need a deep clean before a special event or a thorough spring cleaning, our professional cleaners are available to help.
How do I choose between standard and deep cleaning?
Choosing between standard and deep cleaning services depends on your needs. Standard cleaning is ideal for regular maintenance, while deep cleaning is more comprehensive and suitable for thorough cleanings, such as moving in or out.
Are there affordable cleaning services available at Amenify?
Absolutely. Amenify is committed to providing affordable cleaning services without sacrificing quality. Our various subscription options and competitive cleaning services prices make it easy to find a plan that fits your budget.
How frequently can I schedule cleaning services with Amenify?
You can schedule cleaning services with Amenify on a weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly basis. We also offer one-time cleaning services to accommodate any specific needs you may have.
What preparation is needed before the cleaning service arrives?
Before our cleaners arrive, we recommend clearing personal belongings from countertops and floors, putting trash and recycling in containers, and securely storing pets. This preparation helps our team clean efficiently and thoroughly.
Why is Amenify considered the best cleaning service near me?
Amenify is considered the best cleaning service near you due to our high-quality services, professional staff, and commitment to customer satisfaction. With over 50,000 five-star reviews, residents trust us to keep their homes clean and comfortable.
How can I contact Amenify's support team?
Amenify’s support team is available seven days a week to assist with any questions or concerns. You can contact us through our website or customer service hotline for prompt and friendly assistance.
What makes Amenify a trusted deep cleaning company near me?
, offering customized cleaning services tailored to your needs. Our team of trained professionals uses eco-friendly products to ensure a thorough and safe cleaning experience. Whether it's a one-time deep clean or a regular maintenance schedule, Amenify is committed to delivering top-quality service every time. With flexible scheduling and a reputation for excellence, we are the go-to choice for deep cleaning in your area.

title: About-us
content:

Merchants for Retail, Grocery, Dining

Win or lose, every day we get better.
Create value and doing well by doing good.
to date from strategic PropTech investors: UnitLeader, WISE Ventures, Corevest, and RET Ventures.
It’s a very exciting time for our industry. Property Technology (#proptech) is experiencing a massive shift, unlocking new win-wins together. We believe this is a generational opportunity for a few reasons:
Unprecedented shift to innovation from Real Estate Managers
AI toolkits to streamline projects that weren’t possible before

platform grows, we can increase the value of our network – launching more services, products, and analytics to help create win-wins.
We care about every stakeholder: Property Management, Residents, Local Services & Merchants, and Amenify Team Members.
If this is interesting to you, please let us know. We want to work with people who are passionate about solving complex challenges worth our time and energy.

Enjoy seamless property access and parking assistance with our services. We take care of the details, so you don’t have to worry about access issues or finding a spot. Focus on what matters, and let us handle the logistics.

Maximize efficiency with our routing and auto-dispatch technology. We optimize every job to reduce travel time and ensure quick, accurate service delivery. Get the right expert at the right time, every time.

Experience peace of mind with centralized support available 7 days a week. Our team is here to assist you whenever you need help, ensuring smooth and reliable service every day of the week.

Leverage our connected Provider and Service tools for seamless coordination and real-time updates. Streamline your operations, improve communication, and deliver faster, more efficient service with our integrated solutions.
